## What changed

Brief description of the change.

## Why it changed

What problem this solves or what improvement it brings.

## How I verified it

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npx eslint . --max-warnings 0` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Manual testing steps (if UI change)

## Open questions / follow-up work

Anything the reviewer should know or that needs follow-up.
